zh.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Stapleton II於大約1230年出生在英國越可爾斯塔普萊頓時，他的父親Sir Roger Stapleton49歲，母親Julian de Wath32歲。他於1256年之前與Margery Basset結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1290年享年62歲。

zh-hans.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾斯塔普萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Stapleton II于大约1230年出生在英国越可爾斯塔普萊頓时，他的父亲Sir Roger Stapleton49岁，母亲Julian de Wath32岁。他于1256年之前与Margery Basset结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1290年享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stapleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Stapleton (in Devon, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Herefordshire, Shropshire, Leicestershire, North Yorkshire, Yorkshire, Cumberland), all named in Old English with stapol ‘post, pillar’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The name is common in Ireland, where it has been established since medieval times in the counties of Tipperary and Kilkenny.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Stapleton II was born about 1230, in Stapleton, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Roger Stapleton, was 49 and his mother, Julian de Wath, was 32. He married Margery Basset before 1256. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1290, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Stapleton II est né environ 1230, à Stapleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Roger Stapleton, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Julian de Wath, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margery Basset avant 1256. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1290, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Stapleton II um 1230 in Stapleton, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Stapleton 49 und seine Mutter Julian de Wath 32. Er hat vor 1256 Margery Basset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1290 im Alter von 62 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Stapleton II è nato il circa 1230 nel Stapleton, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Roger Stapleton, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Julian de Wath, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margery Basset prima del 1256. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1290, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.Stapleton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアスタプレトン
ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Stapleton IIが約1230年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスタプレトンで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Stapletonは49歳，母Julian de Wathは32歳であった。1256年以前にMargery Bassetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1290年に62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Stapleton II(이)가 대략 1230년 영국 요르크실르 스타플레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Stapleton(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Julian de Wath(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1256년 이전 Margery Basset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1290년 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.abt. 1230–about 1290: tany ho any amin'ny 1230–tany ho any amin'ny 1290

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Stapleton II nasceu aproximadamente 1230, em Stapleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Roger Stapleton, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Julian de Wath, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Basset antes 1256. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1290, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Stapleton II родился около 1230 г. в местности стаплетон, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Stapleton было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Julian de Wath, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Basset перед 1256 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1290 г. в возрасте 62 лет.

sm.abt. 1230–about 1290: e tusa o le 1230–e tusa o le 1290

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Stapleton II nació aproximadamente 1230, en Stapleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Roger Stapleton, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Julian de Wath, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margery Basset antes de 1256. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1290, a la edad de 62 años.
